UnusedPrivateProperty:ErrorHandlingIntegrationTest.kt$ErrorHandlingIntegrationTest$val firstOpResult = try { queue.enqueue( BleOperationQueue.BleOperation.WriteCharacteristic( gatt = mockGatt, characteristic = mockChar, data = byteArrayOf(0x01), writeType = BluetoothGattCharacteristic.WRITE_TYPE_DEFAULT, ), timeoutMs = 1000, ) fail("Should have thrown exception") } catch (e: RuntimeException) { // Expected "exception_thrown" }
